summary: Tested Breezee360 backend (FastAPI) and frontend landing page end-to-end. All 6 backend pytest cases pass and all 24 frontend UI/integration checks pass. Theme toggle, all data-testid hooks, and both waitlist forms (hero + final CTA) are working with real backend persistence in MongoDB and a visible 'You're in...' success toast.

issues: Body paragraph below the headline appears in very light green on white background — low contrast, hard to read in light mode (visible in landing screenshot, mid-section text is barely legible).

The headline 'No guilt. No burnout. Just a gentler way to become consistent.' visually appears slightly stacked/overlapping with the body copy due to large transparent/light text underneath; consider darkening the supporting paragraph (e.g., text-slate-600 or text-emerald-900/70).

action_items: Improve text contrast for the supporting paragraph inside EmotionalHook.jsx in light mode (currently low-contrast pale green on white).

Optional: verify Resend domain (breezee.uk) so live notification emails to fans@breezee.uk are actually delivered (currently sandbox sender 'onboarding@resend.dev' will fail silent-delivery, which is acceptable per spec — DB persistence + success response are confirmed working).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py correctly excludes MongoDB _id (uses projection {'_id': 0} on reads).
Waitlist endpoint is properly idempotent and lowercases email before lookup — good.
Resend send is wrapped in try/except so failures don't break the API contract — good.
Pydantic EmailStr gives clean 422 validation — good.
Backend uses os.environ['MONGO_URL'] / DB_NAME without defaults (fail-fast) — good.
Frontend uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — good. No hardcoded URLs observed in WaitlistForm.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Test waitlist entries with TEST_ prefixed emails were inserted via pytest and via the UI (hero + cta forms). Safe to ignore or clean up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and exercise GET /api/, POST /api/waitlist (valid, duplicate idempotency, invalid 422, case-insensitive), and GET /api/waitlist/count. Frontend uses Sonner toasts; success message is 'You're in. Check your inbox for our calm hello soon.' Theme toggle adds/removes 'dark' class on <html>. All landing sections expose stable data-testid attributes.
